scripts.vercel:build: pnpm install && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@multisystem/database && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@multisystem/api && mkdir -p packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem && rm -rf packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem/database && cp -r packages/database packages/api/node_modules/@multisystem/database
